# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | ✅ Active support  |
| < 1.0   | ❌ Not supported   |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Ansimax, **please do not open a public issue**.

### How to Report

1. **GitHub Security Advisories** (preferred):  
   Go to [Security → Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/Brashkie/ansimax/security/advisories/new)

2. **Email**:  
   Send details to the maintainer via GitHub profile contact.

### What to Include

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (optional)

### Response Timeline

- **Acknowledgment**: within 48 hours
- **Initial assessment**: within 7 days
- **Fix & disclosure**: within 30 days for critical, 90 days for moderate

We appreciate responsible disclosure and will credit you in the security advisory.
